testcase.name: should render children content
should render app bar with logo and title
should render navigation menu items
should display user avatar with first letter of firstName
should toggle sidebar when menu icon is clicked
should open user menu when avatar is clicked
should navigate when menu item is clicked
should logout and navigate to login when logout is clicked
should call authService.logout when logout is triggered
should handle logout failure gracefully
should clear Redux state after logout
should close user menu after logout
should close user menu when menu item is clicked
should display correct page title based on route
should show theme toggle button
should render sidebar when sidebarOpen is true
should handle user without firstName gracefully
should handle user without firstName or userName
should display user full name in menu
should apply selected style to current route navigation item
calls SessionService.getActiveSessions when document becomes visible
does not call SessionService.getActiveSessions when document becomes hidden
silently ignores errors from the visibility-based session check
removes the visibilitychange listener on unmount
should fetch user profile on mount if firstName or lastName is missing
should always fetch profile on mount to get latest user info
should handle profile fetch error gracefully
should update Redux store with fetched profile data
should display updated user name in avatar after profile fetch
should handle response without data property
